author_rating_explanation: First author Nada Lahjouji is affiliated with University of California, Irvine and Ulster University. UC Irvine is a mid-to-high-tier US research university with concrete AI/CS output. Last author Ashwin Gerard Colaco is affiliated with UC Irvine and UT MD Anderson Cancer Center, which is a medical institution. The UC Irvine affiliation places this in the 6-8 band.
